chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-6305 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.13641/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on CMA No.10246/2025 (Contempt) 3. For order on CMA No.9233/2025 (Restoration) 07.8.2025 Mr. Arshad Jamal Siddiqui advocate for the petitioners -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-3. These are contempt and restoration applications as the earlier contempt application of the petitioners was dismissed on 05.5.2025. Order dated 05.5.2025 is setup below for ease of reference; - “This is an old case of 2017, which is over eight years ago. It appears that this is a disposed of petition and only contempt of Court application is pending. However, today none present for the petitioners without intimation despite this is a date by Court matter. It appears that the applicants / petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this contempt of Court application i.e. CMA No.375/2025, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution.” Learned counsel for the petitioners has not made out a case of restoration in the light of the aforesaid order, which has reproduced above and as such the restoration application as well as contempt application are accordingly dismissed. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
